At 735 AM, the Tom Green County Sheriff Office received a call about a vehicle truck that was swept away by swift water currents in the flooded area of McMillan and Wright Roads in northeastern Tom Green County. The truck was swept approximately 150 yards from the roadway, to near a tree. The cab of the truck was submerged, and the occupants were clinging to the tree above the flood waters. All of the 5 victims were successfully rescued by first responders from the Tom Green County Sheriff Office and the San Angelo Fire Department. The Texas Department of Public Safety and Texas Parks and Wildlife Department were also involved in the rescue efforts.
